title: $CASCADE_TRIGGER
text: $CASCADE_TRIGGER Activate the delete trigger for all removed occurrences. $CASCADE_TRIGGER Defaults Assignment file: client assignment files Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description $CASCADE_TRIGGER ensures that the processing initiated by store or erase activates the delete trigger for all inner down entities, including the innermost. When this setting is not present, the innermost entity is deleted with the connector function request * (Wildcard delete/nullify) . In this case, the delete trigger for the innermost entity is not activated. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
